title: Review Contract
description: Canonical schema for scoped infrastructure-aware Claude reviews. Covers verdict, structured findings, failure scenarios, and a prioritized fix stack.

review_id.description: Unique identifier for this review instance (e.g. 'rev-p-gap-detection-2026-03-17').

scope_id.description: Identifier of the review manifest / subsystem that was reviewed (e.g. 'p_gap_detection').

reviewed_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the review was produced.

verdict.description: Overall gate verdict for this review.

findings.description: Ordered list of structured findings from the review.

failure_scenarios.description: Anticipated failure scenarios that could affect the reviewed subsystem.

priority_fix_stack.description: Ordered stack of fixes to apply before this review can be upgraded to GO. Items are finding_ids.

minimum_bar_to_proceed.description: Human-readable statement of the minimum criteria required to proceed (overrides verdict when present).

title.description: Short, descriptive title for the finding.

evidence.description: File paths, contract IDs, test names, or doc sections that support the finding.

why_it_matters.description: Explanation of the impact of this finding on the system or downstream consumers.

fix_type.description: Scope of effort required to fix the finding.

downstream_risk.description: Description of downstream risk if this finding is left unaddressed.

priority_rank.description: Relative priority rank among all findings (1 = highest priority).

scenario_id.description: Stable identifier for this failure scenario (e.g. 'FS-001').

likelihood.description: Estimated likelihood of this failure scenario occurring.

impact.description: Estimated impact if this failure scenario occurs.

mitigation.description: Optional mitigation strategy for this failure scenario.
